'''Parfadi''' was a region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]]<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|III|13|Parfadi}}</ref> located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It contained the unnavigable [[Black Nebula/Legends|Black Nebula]]. The Parfadi region separated the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Arat Fraca]] and [[Motexx]].<ref name="SoL" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
